items.title: AeroDef Manufacturing 2025 Comes to Detroit With Expanded Focus on Defense Industry
items.author: N/A
items.description: AeroDef Manufacturing 2025, a comprehensive event focused on advancing the aerospace and defense industries, will be held in Detroit from April 8-10, 2025. The event will feature advanced technology exhibits, thought leadership, and educational sessions from industry experts. It will be co-located with other major industry events, providing attendees with access to a wide range of innovations in manufacturing, mobility, and additive manufacturing.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article mentions that Bell Textron, along with other leading companies, will provide direction to the event, indicating their involvement and support.
